Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Continued To Sep-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Disclaimer
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Cahill for Dierdre Hansen.

The Court stated that the petition as filed did not comply with probate code 277. The Petition To Approve the Disclaimer was denied without prejudice. The Court stated that the alternative was that since the Minor was turning 18 within a month, to deny today's petition and continue tomorrow's Petition For Final Distribution so that the Minor could sign the disclaimer. The Petition For Final Distribution was continued to September 29, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
